rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:20 72 117 109 109 105 110 103 95 48 48]>♪The sludge is gone! Hooray, hooray!
The sludge has gone away, away!♪

<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:22 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103 95 48 49]>They found The Exalted Dorephan!<unk[5:1]> And!
Also! King Sidon returned to the domain!

<unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>♪It's amazing! It's great! Maybe it's
even fate!♪

<unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 48]>ステキな<Ruby={2:4}ひと>人の ステキな<Ruby={4:8}まいにち>毎日を<Ruby={4:8}おうえん>応援するの～♪
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:20 72 117 109 109 105 110 103 95 48 48]>Hee-hee!<unk[5:0]> I'm doing hard work for the
King Sidon fan club!

I mean, can you believe it?<unk[5:0]>
Now our super-charming Sidon
is the ACTUAL KING!
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>So I've got a lot on my plate, you know?
I can't just play kiddie games all day.<unk[5:1]>
♪No way, no way!♪
<unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 48]>♪I've gotta support our wonderful and
amazing king every single day!♪

<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>Ooh! Now that Sidon is king...


Do you think he'll become all huge like
The Exalted Dorephan?!

<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 48]>Hee-hee, can you imagine? I'm sooo
looking forward to watching him GROW
into his new role!

<unk[3:0:261]><unk[4:0:12 87 97 107 101 117 112]>It's time to get some sleep.<unk[5:1]>
See you tomorrow!
